case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: NTC OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY OTHER LONG, KAREN DBA KAREN'S BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR NOV-16-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
OPPOSITION TO MOTION BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,180.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION, 301, MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT. JUDGE BUSCH DISCLOSED THAT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, IS A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY AND NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE. BOB SROBODT WAS NOT ALLOWED BY COURT TO REPRESENT KAREN LONG OR THE BONDING COMPANY. HE IS NOT AN ATTORNEY AND HAVE NO STANDING TO APPEAR IN COURT. KAREN LONG'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR # 4780
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-16-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
